footer.tagline: A simple framework to understand and manage your finances over time.
footer.closingPhrase: Build your financial peace of mind, one ritual at a time.

freeResources.title: Free monthly budget template
freeResources.description: A simple, ready-to-use spreadsheet to lay the foundation of your financial management. Income, expenses, savings — at a glance.

hero.title: Build a system
hero.description: Most people don't manage their money badly. They just don't have a system to steer it. Steero gives you one — with clear rituals, from operational to strategic.

realProblem.label: THE REAL PROBLEM
realProblem.title: You don't spend too much. You steer too rarely.
realProblem.description: Financial drift doesn't happen in a day. It settles in over three weeks of not looking, then reveals itself at the end of the month — when it's too late to correct. It's not a lack of discipline. It's the absence of a regular steering system.
realProblem.card1: You check your accounts once a month, when the damage is already done.
realProblem.card2: You intend to "manage better" but have no dedicated time or structure.
realProblem.card3: You underestimate your real spending by 20 to 30% — financial memory is selective.

tempo.label: THE TEMPO SYSTEM
tempo.title: 5 rituals. From daily to yearly.
tempo.description: A pilot doesn't check their instruments once a month. Steero is built around 5 rituals at different frequencies — from operational to strategic.

t.name: Track
t.desc: Record your transactions, stay connected, avoid invisible drift.

e.name: Examine
e.desc: Compare planned vs actual. Correct course before it's too late.

m.name: Master
m.desc: Consciously decide where your money goes. Take back control of your choices.

p.name: Position
p.desc: Align finances and life goals. Move beyond transactions.

o.name: Orient
o.desc: Global review, major directions, strategic trade-offs. Choose the future.

whySteeroSection.label: WHY STEERO
whySteeroSection.title: What truly sets us apart.
whySteeroSection.description: Not automatic aggregation. Not pie charts. Awareness and consistency.

card1.title: Input is intentional
card1.desc: Recording a transaction is already becoming aware of it. Pre-filled templates reduce friction to a few seconds — without removing the gesture.

card2.title: A ritual, not a dashboard
card2.desc: Steero is built around frequencies, not features. The TEMPO system gives you a management framework — like a manager pilots their team.

card3.title: From operational to strategic
card3.desc: 5 minutes a day to prevent drift. 60 minutes a year to decide direction. Both levels in the same tool.

whySteeroSection.quote: "I want a clear, real-time view of my situation."
whySteeroSection.quoteCaption: What our users say. What Steero builds.

features.title: No automation that turns you into a mere spectator
features.description: With Steero, you become the pilot: you understand, adjust, and ritualize your financial trajectory to reach the destination you've chosen.

budget.title: Budget
budget.description: Your resources are limited: they allow you to build the present and prepare for the future. Defining them well is essential. Create clear budgets with the trajectory, our intuitive tool that guides you to define your destination.

capture.title: Log
capture.description: Unlike other apps, Steero doesn't do it for you. Manual logging creates an emotional connection: which significantly improves self-regulation… We've enhanced it with the Level - The budget gauge that shows what's spent, spent with the entry, and remaining.

ritualize.title: Step #3: Stay aligned with your goals
ritualize.description: Financial understanding doesn't rely solely on knowledge, but on behavioral habits. Conscious repetition is a key factor in lasting change. Rituals tell you what to do, what to look at, what questions to ask yourself, and how to prepare for what's next.

whySteero.heroDescription: A different approach to financial management, based on understanding, consistency, and lasting change.
whySteero.missionP1: Steero was born from a simple observation: personal finance apps automate everything, but don't change your behavior.
whySteero.missionP2: Our mission is to help you develop a real understanding of your financial management, not just a tool to view automatically generated charts.
whySteero.quote: True financial freedom comes from understanding, which is born and strengthened through action, not automation.
whySteero.alternativesDescription: Solutions that promise a lot, but don't really change your habits.

steero.title: Steero
steero.description: A simple framework, built to last.

whySteero.behavioralDescription: Steero helps everyone consciously steer their financial trajectory, rather than letting it control them.
whySteero.clickToDiscover: Click on each principle to discover the details.

cognitive.title: Understanding comes from cognitive effort
cognitive.subtitle: Not from simple exposure to information
cognitive.description:
Cognitive sciences are very clear on one point: seeing information is not understanding it.

The brain learns durably when it is active, not passive. Manual recording requires:

• identifying the expense,
• categorizing it,
• comparing it to an intention (budget, goal),
• consciously accepting it.

This mechanism is close to what's called "learning by doing" or active learning, widely documented in educational psychology.

➡️ Automation removes cognitive effort, therefore deep understanding. Automation creates an illusion of control. It doesn't develop real mastery.

illusion.title: Automation creates an illusion of control
illusion.subtitle: It doesn't develop real mastery
illusion.description:
Numerous studies show that automated tools generate an illusion of mastery:

• "My accounts are connected"
• "My expenses are categorized"
• "I have a dashboard"

But:

• the user can't explain where their money goes,
• nor why they deviate from their goals,
• nor which lever to activate.

This phenomenon is close to passive overconfidence bias, reinforced by automatic systems.

➡️ Automation shifts responsibility to the tool, not to the user.

ritual.title: Ritual transforms finance into behavior
ritual.subtitle: Ritual develops understanding and mastery
ritual.description:
Financial understanding doesn't rely solely on knowledge, but on behavioral habits.

Ritualizing (e.g., a few minutes per day and week) allows:

• anchoring a conscious routine,
• creating a regular point of contact with financial reality,
• transforming an abstract constraint into tangible practice.

Research on habits shows that:

• conscious repetition is a key factor for lasting change,
• micro-rituals are more effective than occasional automated reviews.

➡️ Steero doesn't just aim to "show numbers", but also to install a behavior.

emotional.title: Manual logging creates an emotional connection
emotional.subtitle: The key to decision-making
emotional.description:
A manually recorded expense is not neutral:

• it triggers a micro emotional evaluation,
• it makes the cost psychologically real,
• it reinforces the memory of the decision.

It's the same mechanism as:

• writing goals by hand,
• noting meals in a food diary,
• keeping an expense journal.

Studies show that this conscious self-observation significantly improves self-regulation.

➡️ Without minimal friction, there is neither awareness nor real arbitration.

learning.title: Automating too early prevents learning
learning.subtitle: One of the classic mistakes when regaining control
learning.description:
Automation is useful… after understanding, not before.

In most current apps:

• the user is bombarded with data,
• without mental framework,
• without implicit pedagogy,
• without appropriation.

Result:

• quick abandonment,
• passive consultation,
• no real progress.

Conversely, Steero adopts a logic similar to learning to drive: first understand and feel, then optimize and automate.

➡️ The goal is not to remove effort, but to make it useful, short, and intentional.

whySteero.testimonialsTitle: What we'd love our users to say about Steero

testimonials.author: Thomas D.

testimonials.quote: Simple, effective, no hassle. Exactly what I needed to regain control.
testimonials.author: Sophie M.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.discoverHow: Discover how Steero works in practice.
faq.ctaDescription: Join the waitlist and be among the first to try Steero.

q1.question: Who is Steero for?
q1.answer:
Steero is for anyone who wants to take control of their finances, without becoming an expert or spending hours managing numbers.

Whether you're just starting out or have already tried spreadsheets, budgeting apps, or automated tools, Steero is for you if you're looking for clarity, understandable benchmarks, and a simple framework to move forward over time.

There are no financial prerequisites.

q2.question: What's the difference between Steero and a banking app or aggregator?
q2.answer:
Banking apps and aggregators mainly show what has already happened: balances, transactions, retrospective charts.

Steero takes a different approach. Steero is a steering tool, not just a viewing tool. It allows you to:
• set a direction (goals)
• follow a trajectory (budgets, indicators)
• spot gaps
• consciously adjust your decisions
• follow a clear rhythm that guides you

Where other tools inform, Steero helps you understand and act.

q3.question: Does Steero replace my banking app?
q3.answer:
No, and that's not its goal. Your banking app remains essential for paying, checking your accounts, and performing banking operations.

Steero complements it. It allows you to step back, structure your financial vision, and steer what your banking apps don't do: your rituals, your goals, your trajectory, your trade-offs.

In summary: the bank executes, Steero helps you decide.

q1.question: Why doesn't Steero connect to my banks?
q1.answer:
Automate ≠ Understand. 100% automated tools show numbers, but don't teach. Without cognitive effort, the user sees their finances without mastering them. Common result: illusion of control → disengagement → abandonment.

Understanding comes from conscious action. Manually recording a transaction forces you to identify the expense, categorize it, and link it to a budget or goal. This micro-effort activates learning and memory. It's the principle of learning by doing: you understand by doing.

Ritual creates lasting behavior. Steero favors a short, regular ritual. Conscious repetition transforms finance into a habit, not a constraint. A habit always beats a forgotten automated dashboard.

q2.question: How long does it take to record my transactions?
q2.answer:
Very little time — and much less than you might think.

In reality, most people make a few transactions per day, sometimes only a few per week. With Steero, recording them takes a few seconds. It's not about obsessively logging everything, but capturing the essentials regularly.

Why it's not burdensome:
• You don't have dozens of lines per day
• Recurring transactions quickly become natural to enter thanks to transaction templates
• The action fits into a simple ritual, not a chore

What you gain: you know where you stand without waiting until the end of the month, and you immediately spot where you are thanks to a dynamic budget indicator.

q3.question: Does Steero give financial advice?
q3.answer:
No. And it's intentional.

Steero doesn't provide personalized financial advice and doesn't replace a professional (financial advisor, tax specialist, lawyer).

The analyses, charts, projections, and indicators offered by Steero have an informational and educational purpose: they help you better understand your situation, visualize your trajectory, and step back from your decisions.

They are neither individualized recommendations nor guarantees of performance or results. Steero doesn't decide for you.

q1.question: Is my data secure?
q1.answer:
Yes. Security and respect for your data are priorities.

• Your data is stored securely
• Steero doesn't sell your information
• You remain the owner of your data at all times

Steero is designed as a trusted, sustainable, and respectful tool — not as a product based on exploiting your information.

We invite you to read the terms of service before trying.

q2.question: Where is my data stored?
q2.answer:
Your data is hosted on secure servers in Europe, in compliance with current regulations (GDPR).

We use modern encryption technologies and proven security practices to ensure the confidentiality and integrity of your information.

q1.question: Is Steero free?
q1.answer:
Yes, Steero is free for 14 days. This period allows you to discover the tool, use it in your daily life, and check if it naturally fits your way of managing your finances. No pressure — you can stop at any time during this period.

And after 14 days? A subscription is required to continue. This subscription helps maintain and improve the solution, ensure a stable experience, and develop new features.

An intentionally accessible price: the main subscription will cost less than €10 per month — the equivalent of a coffee per week, or a few minutes less of mental load each day.

q2.question: How does the waitlist work?
q2.answer:
The waitlist allows you to reserve your spot to access Steero as soon as it launches.

By signing up, you'll be among the first to know when the app opens. You'll receive an email to create your account and start your 14-day free trial.

Registration is free and non-binding.

q3.question: Can I use Steero on mobile?
q3.answer:
Not at the moment — and it's a deliberate choice. Steero is designed as a steering tool, not as an app to check between two notifications.

The financial ritual we advocate requires calm and concentration. Understanding a financial trajectory requires depth of information, comparisons, readable indicators, and a global vision.

Mobile is great for quick consultation. It's much less so for thinking, analyzing, and consciously adjusting. Steero is not designed to be "checked", but to be used with intention.

And for the future? Mobile is not excluded, but if it comes one day, it will be to serve steering, not to impoverish it.

q4.question: Will Steero evolve over time?
q4.answer:
Yes, and it's at the heart of the project.

Steero is designed as a long-term product, which evolves gradually to remain simple, relevant, and aligned with users' real needs.

New features will enrich the experience, always with the same philosophy:
• no unnecessary complexity
• no automation that dispossesses
• only what really helps to better steer

Subscriptions are precisely used to maintain this quality and make Steero evolve in the right direction.

onboarding.title: Personalized Path
onboarding.microPromise: Set the foundations of your financial direction.
onboarding.details: A guided journey that helps you define your goals, income, fixed expenses, and priorities. No jargon, no complexity: just the right questions to create your financial framework.

budget.title: Budget Structure
budget.details: Create categories and subcategories that reflect your real life. Organize your expenses hierarchically for a clear vision of what really matters.

fixed.title: Fixed Transactions
fixed.details: Plan your income, expenses, and deadlines for the month. Anticipate when your cash flow will be tight and keep a clear calendar of your movements.

daily.title: Templates & Quick Entry
daily.microPromise: Record your expenses in an instant.
daily.details: Create templates for your frequent transactions: coffee, groceries, gas... One tap is enough to record, the system learns your habits.

level.title: The Level
level.microPromise: Visualize your margin in real time.
level.details: With each entry, instantly visualize: what has already been spent, what the current expense represents, and what will remain available in your budget.

rituals.title: Habit Tracker
rituals.details: A ritual system that guides you on what to do, what to look at, and what questions to ask yourself. Develop lasting financial habits.

indicators.title: Decision Support
indicators.microPromise: Spot gaps before they settle in.
indicators.details: A clear budget view that highlights what deserves your attention. Quickly understand your situation and make informed decisions with indicators designed to help you adjust your trajectory.

projects.title: Project Management
projects.promise: Link multiple budgets around a single objective.
projects.description: Group multiple budgets under a single objective with a defined timeline. Whether it's a trip, renovation, or event: track your progress and maintain a cross-cutting view of allocated resources.

tiers.title: Third-Party & Cash Flow Management
tiers.promise: Clarify what you owe, what's owed to you, and the real impact on your cash flow.
tiers.description: Track what you owe and what's owed to you. Expense reports, advances between friends, expected reimbursements: this view clarifies your real cash flow and helps anticipate incoming and outgoing transactions.

patrimoine.title: Net Worth Management
patrimoine.promise: Understand your overall financial situation at a glance.
patrimoine.description: Identify your assets (savings, investments, property) and liabilities (loans, debts). Understand your net worth as a key indicator of your overall financial situation.

animations.onboardingClosing: A guided journey to establish a clear framework, without jargon or complexity.
animations.budgetClosing: A structured monthly budget to reflect your real life.
animations.ritualsClosing: Simple check-ins to stay on track, without pressure.
animations.indicatorsClosing: Concrete support for decisions, before gaps settle in.
animations.fixedClosing: Centralize the management of what comes in and goes out on a fixed basis each month and the share of fixed expenses on my income.
animations.name: Name
animations.dailyClosing: A simple and intuitive way to create your favorite one-time operations: everything is pre-filled, just validate!
animations.gaugeClosing: Each expense shows you immediately where you stand, allowing you to adjust your financial behavior.
animations.gaugeEachEntry: This indicator appears with each entry
animations.projectClosing: A project isn't just another budget: it's your cross-functional view.
animations.tiersClosing: I know where my money is, even when it's not in my account.
animations.patrimoineClosing: I have a global, synthetic, and evolving overview of my net worth.

featured.title: Your first step towards financial clarity
featured.subtitle: A simple, free, ready-to-use monthly budget template to build the foundation of your financial management.
featured.description: Before using a tool like Steero, you need to start by seeing clearly. This Excel template lets you lay the foundation: your income, fixed and variable expenses, savings — and instantly see your available balance.
featured.why1: Because 80% of people don't know exactly where their money goes each month.
featured.why2: Because a simple spreadsheet can already change your perception of your finances.
featured.why3: Because clarity is the first step towards control.
featured.contains2: Fixed and variable expenses with automatic variances
featured.limit1: Habit tracking, rituals and limited dashboard.
featured.limit2: This template is a starting point. To go further, Steero transforms this foundation into a real steering system.
featured.downloadFormat: .xlsx format — Compatible with Excel, Google Sheets, LibreOffice

1.title: You spend too much every month: here's why (and how to stop)
1.hook: You end the month in the red or just breaking even without being able to explain exactly why. You didn't splurge or blow an extravagant weekend budget and yet, the numbers aren't there. It's not a discipline problem. It's a frequency-of-looking problem.
sections: It's not that you spend too much. It's that you look too rarely.
The 4 invisible leaks that sink a professional's budget
Why good resolutions don't work
The real solution: a 5-level steering system
Where to start when starting from zero
What you'll change this week

2.title: Financial skill building: from confusion to control
2.hook: Managing your money poorly or not steering it — it's not the same thing. Here's how to concretely go from one to the other, step by step.
sections: Reacting vs. steering: the only distinction that matters
Step 1: Observe without judging (Trace level)
Step 2: Structure to turn numbers into information (Examine level)
Step 3: Understand gaps to take back control (Master level)
Step 4: Align finances and goals (Position and Orient levels)
Why skill building fails before it starts
Steering is learned. Like any skill.

3.title: Why no financial tool works without a ritual
3.hook: Finary, Bankin, Excel — you've tried them. And you gave up. The problem isn't the tool. It's the lack of a ritual to keep it alive. Here's why — and how to change that.
sections: Most personal finance apps are rearview mirrors
A ritual is not a monthly review
Why financial rituals fail before they even start
The TEMPO system: five rituals, five frequencies, one direction
What it actually changes
The only tool that works is the one you use regularly

4.title: 5 minutes a day to never suffer through end-of-month again
4.hook: A 2-minute financial ritual is a myth. 5 minutes a day with the right structure is what lastingly changes your relationship with money. Here's why.
sections: The real problem: trying to do everything at once
One ritual, one question. No more.
The 5 levels of the TEMPO system
So, 2 minutes: myth or reality?
What a ritual architecture changes

5.title: Your finances are not a report card. Stop reading them like one.
5.hook: If looking at your finances makes you uncomfortable, the problem isn't the numbers. It's the mindset you bring to them. Here's how to change that.
sections: The rearview mirror doesn't judge you. Your brain does.
Why financial avoidance takes hold
The steering posture: observe without judging
Seeing clearly is already deciding better
From observation to decision: the role of rituals
What a factual reading of your finances changes

6.title: The 50/30/20 rule: why it reassures but changes nothing
6.hook:
50% for needs. 30% for wants. 20% for savings. Simple, clear, reassuring. And practically useless if you stop there.

It's not that the rule is wrong. It's that it answers the wrong question.
sections: Why this rule is so popular and why it's a problem
The real problem: the rule tells you where to go, not how to get there
The rule as a rearview mirror
Why the rule becomes guilt-inducing without meaning to
What you need instead: an adaptive system
Use the rule as a starting point, not a destination

7.title: Why your Excel budget spreadsheet never lasts more than 3 weeks
7.hook:
You searched for "free budget Excel spreadsheet". You downloaded one, maybe several. You opened it, configured it, filled it in diligently for a few days. And three weeks later, you never touched it again.

It's not an Excel problem. It's not a spreadsheet problem. And it's definitely not a discipline problem.

It's a system problem.
sections: Excel is not the culprit
The 3-week abandonment cycle
What's missing in every Excel budget spreadsheet
The ritual that keeps any tool alive
So why not stick with Excel?
The right diagnosis changes everything

8.title: Save €500 this month: what nobody really tells you
8.hook:
You want to save €500 this month. Most articles will answer with a list: cancel Netflix, meal prep, stop takeaway coffee, avoid impulse buys.

You already know that list. It hasn't helped. Because it answers the wrong question.

The question isn't "how to spend less?" It's "where are those €500 already going without you seeing it?"
sections: The €500 is probably already there
Why budget cuts alone don't work
The real work: map before you cut
TEMPO level M: where the €500 appears
What you can do this week
€500 in savings or €500 in choices?

9.title: The best app to manage your money isn't the one you think
9.hook:
You're looking for the best app to manage your money. You'll find dozens of comparisons — top 10 lists, feature tables, App Store ratings, user reviews. They'll all answer your question.

None of them will question whether it's the right question.
sections: The personal finance app market has a structural problem
What comparisons never measure
The automatic rearview mirror vs the conscious windshield
What an app really needs to do to change your situation
Why total automation doesn't deliver on its promise
The criteria that really matter when choosing an app
The paradox of the best app

10.title: Your bank card has made you financially numb
10.hook: You earn well. You don't have irrational spending habits. And yet, every end of the month, something is missing. It's not a revenue problem. It's a perception problem. And your bank card is directly responsible.
sections: Paying hurts, or doesn't anymore: what research really says
Why cards decouple purchasing from pain
Mental accounting: how your brain classifies and distorts money
What it concretely changes in your end of month
The anesthesia of digital money: what automatic apps make worse
The rearview mirror doesn't hurt: that's the problem
Manual entry as an act of awareness: why it's a design choice
This is exactly what Steero chose not to automate
How to install this mechanism in your life: the T ritual of TEMPO
What changes after 3 weeks

Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, or adaptation of all or part of the site elements, by any means or process, is prohibited without prior written authorization from Steero SAS.

s4.title: 4. Personal data protection
s4.content: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify, delete, and object to personal data concerning you. To exercise these rights, you can contact us at: contact@steero.fr

s5.title: 5. Cookies
s5.content: This site uses cookies to improve user experience and measure audience. You can configure your browser to refuse cookies, but some site features may no longer be available.

s6.title: 6. Contact
s6.content: For any questions regarding these legal notices, you can contact us at the following email address: contact@steero.fr

s1.title: 1. Why this policy?
s1.intro: Your privacy is important to us.
items: how we use and protect it,
s1.outro: It applies to all application users.

s2.title: 2. Who is responsible for your data?

s3.title: 3. What data do we collect?
s3.intro: We only collect data necessary for the application to function.
s3.note: 👉 No banking data is collected without your explicit voluntary action.
technicalItems: Anonymized usage data (to improve the product)

s4.title: 4. Why do we use this data?
s4.noProfiling: We do not do any advertising profiling.

s5.title: 5. Legal basis for processing (GDPR)
s5.intro: In accordance with GDPR, processing is based on:
items: Contract execution (normal use of the application)

s6.title: 6. Data sharing
s6.noSell: We never sell your data. Never.
s6.shared: Your data may only be shared with:
items: strictly within the scope of application operation,
with contractual guarantees compliant with GDPR.
s6.outro: No data is transmitted to third parties for commercial purposes.

s7.title: 7. Where is your data stored?
s7.location: Data is hosted within the European Union or in countries recognized as adequate by the European Commission.
s7.scc: If a provider outside the EU is used, standard contractual clauses (SCC) are implemented.

s8.title: 8. How long do we keep your data?
s8.content: Data is kept for the duration of your use of the application, then deleted or anonymized in accordance with legal obligations.

s9.title: 9. Data security
s9.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures:
s9.outro: No system is infallible, but security is a priority.

s10.title: 10. Your rights (GDPR)
s10.intro: In accordance with GDPR, you have the following rights:
items: Right to erasure (right to be forgotten)
Right to withdraw your consent at any time
s10.exercise: 📩 To exercise your rights: Contact us at

s11.title: 11. Account deletion
s11.intro: You can delete your account directly from the application.
items: the deletion of your personal data,

s12.title: 12. Cookies and trackers
s12.outro: No advertising cookies without explicit consent.

s13.title: 13. Policy changes
s13.outro: In case of major changes, you will be informed.

s14.title: 14. Complaint
s14.intro: If you believe your rights are not being respected, you can:
items: or file a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (e.g., CNIL in France).

pricing.seoDescription: Discover Steero at €8/month: full access to all features to take control of your finances.
pricing.subtitle: Full access to Steero. No watered-down Free plan, no features hidden behind a higher tier.
pricing.description: Everything you need to steer your budget day after day. Full TEMPO rituals, ready-made templates, trajectory tracking.
pricing.founderText1: Steero is evolving. New features are coming. This price will change with the platform — early users will always enjoy the best conditions, whatever they may be.
pricing.earlyText1: The first 200 waitlist subscribers get −50% for life on their subscription. Non-cumulative offer, spots not guaranteed after the first 200.
pricing.earlyDisclaimer: The discount applies to the current public price. If the price changes in the future, your discount will remain applied.
pricing.guarantee: 14-day free trial at launch · Credit card required at the end of the trial
pricing.faqDescription: Check out our FAQ to learn more about Steero.
pricing.impactTitle: Financial mastery shouldn't be a privilege.
pricing.impactIntro: Some highly motivated people don't always have the means to access this kind of tool. A limited number of spots is reserved each year for determined users whose resources are temporarily limited.
pricing.impactConditionsText: Student, early career, or temporarily difficult financial situation. 50% discount, renewable annually. Applications reviewed individually.
